recommendations.title: The Advent Calendar

recommendations.title: Abigail
recommendations.overview: A young girl Abigail lives in a city whose borders were closed many years ago because of an epidemic of a mysterious disease. Abby's father was one of the sick - and he was taken when she was six years old. Going against the authorities to find his f

recommendations.title: Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: During the rise of fascism in Mussolini's Italy, a wooden boy brought magically to life struggles to live up to his father's expectations.

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: When two siblings stumble on a strange hole in the wall of their grandparents' house, horrifying incidents reveal sinister secrets about their family.

recommendations.title: The Lion Woman
recommendations.overview: Eva Arctander is born with hypertrichosis, meaning that she is covered from head to toe with fine blonde hair. Her father is so ashamed of her that he hides her away from the world in their apartment. However, Eva’s nanny fights for her right to be t

recommendations.title: The Five Devils
recommendations.overview: 8-year-old Vicky has a mysterious gift: she can recreate any scent she comes across, even that of her beloved mother Joanne. When her estranged aunt Julia suddenly returns to town, the invocation of her fragrance plunges the young girl back in time t

recommendations.title: Flowers in the Attic
recommendations.overview: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother.

recommendations.title: Freaks - You're One of Us
recommendations.overview: After having a chance encounter with a mysterious character, Wendy, a young working class mother, discovers that she has super powers.

recommendations.title: The Shining
recommendations.overview: Jack Torrance accepts a caretaker job at the Overlook Hotel, where he, along with his wife Wendy and their son Danny, must live isolated from the rest of the world for the winter. But they aren't prepared for the madness that lurks within.

recommendations.title: My Brother, My Sister
recommendations.overview: When their father's will forces them to live together, siblings Nik and Tesla — and Tesla's kids — try to overcome their differences to become a family.
